creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 233123
Patch to update devel/libpeas and devel/py-libpeas

- Update devel/libpeas (and slave port) to 1.32.0
- Re-organize Makefile, in order to disable some options for slave port
- Add new option DEMOS
- Disable DOCS option, because it requires textproc/py-gi-docgen >= 2021.7, but update pkg-plist (build against textproc/py-gi-docgen 2022.1)
